title: ocimum gratissimum var. suave
intro: Ocimum gratissimum var. suave, also known as lemon basil, is a variety of the Ocimum gratissimum plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ocimum gratissimum var. suave include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of cold and flu. The herbal preparations of Ocimum gratissimum var. suave include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
